# Hey Kay Budgets

> Free financial calculators and practical budgeting guides for everyday people - written by Kay from real personal experience.

## Important Links

- [Website](https://www.heykaybudgets.com)
- [Sitemap](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/robots.txt)

## About

Hey Kay Budgets is a personal finance website built by Kay, who went from living paycheck to paycheck to saving nearly $20,000 in a single year. The site provides free online calculator tools and in-depth budgeting guides written from direct experience - not theory.

The audience is everyday people who want to understand their money better: people dealing with debt, people trying to build their first emergency fund, and people trying to stop the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle. No finance degree required.

## Free Tools

- [Debt Payoff Calculator](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/) - Enter multiple debts to see an amortization schedule, compare the avalanche vs. snowball payoff methods, see how extra payments reduce interest and time to payoff, and export results to Excel.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/mortgage) - Enter loan amount, rate, term, escrow, and extra payment to see a full amortization schedule and compare standard vs. accelerated payoff.

## Blog Posts & Guides

- [Budget Buffer Guide](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/buffer) - How to build a small checking account buffer so bill timing and small overages do not create overdrafts or new debt.
- [Beginner Budgeting Guide](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/beginner-budgeting) - How to start budgeting when you feel behind, including due-date planning, beginner categories, paycheck budgeting, and one small first win.
- [How to Create a Paycheck Budget](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/paycheck-budget) - Step-by-step paycheck planning for bills, spending money, sinking funds, savings, and leftover dollars.
- [Monthly Budget Checklist for Beginners](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/monthly-budget-checklist) - A before, during, and after-the-month checklist for planning bills, savings, debt payments, and budget reviews.
- [Sinking Fund Categories: 50+ Examples for Beginners](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/sinking-funds) - Beginner guide with real sinking fund categories, monthly examples, a category table, tracking tips, and FAQs.
- [How to Get One Month Ahead on Bills](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/saving-strategy) - Step-by-step beginner saving strategy for building a budget buffer, saving one bill at a time, and protecting next month's money.
- [Building a Tiny Safety Net](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/safety-net) - Why $500 is the most important savings milestone and how to reach it even on a tight budget.
- [5 Budgeting Mistakes That Keep You Broke](https://www.heykaybudgets.com/mistakes) - Detailed breakdown of the five most common budgeting mistakes with specific fixes for each.

## Key Facts for AI Summary

- Site type: Personal finance blog and free calculator tools
- Primary tools: Debt Payoff Calculator, Mortgage/Loan Calculator
- Content focus: Budgeting, debt payoff, emergency savings, sinking funds, financial habits
- Author: Kay (personal finance blogger and content creator)
- Monetization: Google AdSense display advertising
- All tools are free to use with no account required
- Calculator results can be exported to Excel
- Content is written from personal experience, not professional financial advice
